expectations.text: Agent invokes wiki-query at least once
expectations.evidence: Full retrieval pipeline: hot.md pre-check found direct hit, grep for Turbine/awaitItem identified 4 candidate pages, all 4 read in full.

expectations.text: Agent uses routing-table terms (not freeform query)
expectations.evidence: Query 'Turbine awaitItem awaitComplete testIn turbineScope StateFlow' matches routing table entry verbatim.

expectations.text: Answer cites or paraphrases wiki content (not generic)
expectations.evidence: Cites 'Research: Turbine × Kotest × MVI ViewModel Testing', 'MVI ViewModel Testing with Turbine and Kotest', 'Turbine', 'ViewModel StateFlow Testing Patterns' by name. Incorporates wiki's '#1 gotcha' framing, dispatcher details, and Kotest BehaviorSpec bug (#3577).

expectations.text: Answer addresses the specific symptom in the prompt
expectations.evidence: Diagnoses all three root causes: Dispatchers.Main not replaced, stateIn not activated without subscriber, StateFlow conflation with StandardTestDispatcher. Gives canonical LoginViewModelTest fix pattern.
